item.title: 小米15S Pro首發測評！好消息是，用著沒啥區別｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: 小米15S Pro首發測評！好消息是，用著沒啥區別｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解小米最新發布的旗艦手機小米 15S Pro的詳細測評。
  • 掌握關於小米自研晶片「玄戒 O1」在效能、圖像處理及網路連線方面的實測數據與分析。
  • 比較小米 15S Pro與前代或其他旗艦機型在實際使用體驗上的異同，包含相機表現、螢幕特性等。

摘要

介紹與核心亮點

作者開頭介紹了小米的新旗艦手機小米 15S Pro，指出它比前代多了個「S」。影片的重點是這款手機搭載了小米自研的新晶片「玄戒 O1」，這是小米自己設計的晶片平台。作者認為小米這次的關鍵字是「堆料」。

玄戒 O1 晶片規格與初步體驗

玄戒 O1晶片採用了台積電第二代3 奈米製程，與 Apple A18 Pro、聯發科天璡 9400 等同代工藝。作者提到，玄戒 O1還特別訂製了負責圖像處理的SP部分。然而，儘管有新晶片，作者初步使用感覺顯性的區別沒有很大，許多操作體驗與前代相似。相機的夜景影片能力有顯著提升。

效能實測與遊戲表現

作者對手機的性能進行了測試。在Geekbench跑分中，單核和多核分數超越了 Xiaomi 14 Ultra，對標上了Xiaomi 15 Ultra上的8 Gen 3 Elite。GPU 跑分也甩開了 8 Gen 3 一截，接近天璡 9400。在遊戲測試中，玄戒 O1在《原神》和《王者榮耀》中表現穩定，壓力較大的《明朝》中表現略有下滑，但仍顯著優於前代 8 Gen 3。玄戒 O1的功耗控制也相當不錯。

其他特性與現存問題

作者還測試了手機的螢幕，特別是出廠就貼好的抗反射膜，這在戶外光線下表現出色，大幅減少反光。相比之下，Xiaomi 15 Pro 反光嚴重。不過在網路連線方面，作者發現15S Pro在穩定辨識 5G 訊號方面不如 15 Pro 穩定。作者也提到目前測試的版本在相機色彩等方面還有待優化，特別是油畫感和強行介入的太陽處理。

包裝與自研晶片之路

影片最後展示了小米 15S Pro的包裝盒，這是小米15 週年紀念版。作者回憶起小米 5C 上的澎湃 S1晶片，當時表現不佳，但小米並沒有放棄自研晶片。儘管面臨困難和壓力，小米透過15S Pro的玄戒 O1證明了他們堅持下來了。作者認為小米成功造車、造晶片，未來將走得更順遂。

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TAb2-hUsb7Q

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

小米這回的關鍵字是堆料

F O L L O W M E

Weibo: @大狸子切切里

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/471303350

#數碼 #開箱 #xiaomi #小米

  • 深入了解小米最新發布的旗艦手機小米 15S Pro的詳細測評。

包裝與自研晶片之路

影片最後展示了小米 15S Pro的包裝盒，這是小米15 週年紀念版。作者回憶起小米 5C 上的澎湃 S1晶片，當時表現不佳，但小米並沒有放棄自研晶片。儘管面臨困難和壓力，小米透過15S Pro的玄戒 O1證明了他們堅持下來了。作者認為小米成功造車、造晶片，未來將走得更順遂。

=============

item.title: 千元機整活大賽！我算是看出來了，你們個個都身懷絕技｜不是千元機橫評｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: 千元機整活大賽！我算是看出來了，你們個個都身懷絕技｜不是千元機橫評｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解2025年左右150美元級別入門智慧型手機的真實使用體驗與獨特之處。
  • 比較不同手機品牌（Vivo、小米/紅米、Honor、OPPO）在有限預算下如何開發差異化功能與服務。
  • 探討製造商在入門級市場如何從「萬金油」轉向強調特定實用功能，將手機視為「工具」的設計理念。

摘要

這段影片的作者探討了一個引人入勝的問題：在2025年，使用一款僅需約150美元的新智慧型手機會是什麼樣子？作者想像，如果這樣的裝置捨棄了旗艦手機所謂的「過剩效能」、移除不常用的鏡頭、放棄很少使用的語音助理，轉而加入大電池和大喇叭，它還會被視為一款手機嗎？

然而，在實際購入這些手機之前，作者並沒有預料到這個價位的手機並非只是盲目追隨旗艦機對影像的執著。由於產品經理的預算有限，他們的思路反而更加清晰。作者發現，這些手機實際上比許多旗艦機更加有趣。

作者一口氣買回了OPPO、vivo、小米和Honor等品牌在這個約150美元價位的所有新款機型，目的是為了好玩並向大家展示。他強調這段影片不是橫向對比，而是想和觀眾們聊聊這些手機的趣味之處。

當放下旗艦手機，拿起這些約150美元價位的手機時，作者發現實際體驗與想像的完全不同。即使到了2025年，這些手機也並未因為技術下放而變得流暢無卡頓；恰恰相反，情況是截然不同的。

就作者自己的使用體驗而言，這些手機的返回動畫不一定流暢，打開太多App肯定會卡頓，相機一打開就卡，預覽畫面就像有無線連接延遲一樣。

作者開玩笑說，在使用這些手機一段時間後再回到旗艦機，會覺得一切都變得像iPhone一樣流暢。但作者也提到，各家製造商都是充滿想法的大師。

各品牌入門手機的獨特之處

首先來看vivo。他們在這個價位段推出了相當多的機型，基本上任何類型的手機都可以被歸入Y系列。作者提到其中一款約150美元的型號是Y300。

作者將Y300與約1400美元的iPhone進行了聲音比較，但他承認這對iPhone不太公平，並找來了另一款手機Moto XT1650作為對手。

Moto XT1650的喇叭是後來加裝的，手機本身薄如刀鋒。

作者試聽了Moto的聲音，然後回到正題，比較了Vivo Y300的聲音表現。

vivo的設計充滿復古魅力，雖然使用了節約成本的零件，但結果是除了雙喇叭之外，竟然還能塞進一個額外的喇叭。因此，在聽聲音時，甚至能感覺到聲音帶來的背部震動，就像手握一個喇叭一樣。

Y300的喇叭聲音非常大聲！作者甚至拿著手機到樓下測試，在深圳的路邊，實時聲音聽起來就像是外放一樣，把音量調大後更是驚人。

作者還嘗試用其擴音器進行通話。在嘈雜的環境下，兩部手機的區別真的就是聽得到和聽不到的差別。他描述了在地鐵裡這種手機外放的情景，如果正對著你播放，聲音會全部傳給你，簡直「瘋狂」。

這款vivo手機還有一個旗艦機沒有的功能——「專業模式」。這個模式針對有戶外需求的人群，簡單來說就是高亮度、預設擴音和優先網路連接，將手機視為一個「工具」。

預設擴音功能省去了每次接聽電話都要點擊擴音的步驟，十分方便。關於亮度，產品描述是這樣的。

作者進行了測試，發現亮度並未達到解鎖極限，與旗艦機存在差距。因此，他也測試了它在高溫環境下是否能持續更久。結果顯示，在攝影棚燈光照射下，它的高亮度確實能持續更長時間，這體現了在硬體限制下的巧妙設計思考。

作者問觀眾是否有過在戶外使用手機遇到困難的時刻，並請有此經驗的在評論區輸入「1」。

作者接著提出了一個有趣的想法：如果旗艦機犧牲一顆鏡頭，用喇叭來取代，損失一個原生焦段，但大幅提升音質，觀眾是否願意購買這樣的手機？

接下來是紅米 Note 14。這是這些手機中唯一還提供6GB記憶體選項的，儘管只便宜了7美元。考慮到這款手機的流暢度表現一般，作者建議如果可能，最好選擇記憶體更大的版本。

初看之下，這款手機其實相當普通，給人一種熟悉的感覺。

它保留了許多傳統特點：唯一的紅外線遙控、主鏡頭支援光學防抖、OLED螢幕支援螢幕下指紋辨識、甚至還有3.5mm耳機孔。作者在換SIM卡時才發現它還支援插入TF卡（microSD卡）。

作者開玩笑說，無法在Switch 2上使用的低速記憶卡終於找到了新歸宿。這款小米手機是典型的150美元價位入門機，擁有過去旗艦機喜愛的耳機孔和microSD卡槽等功能。但作者認為，或許因為發布時間較早，這款機型在主硬體規格上與同價位的競爭對手相比並不出色。如果堅持選擇小米，作者建議不要太死守預算，多花一點錢購買Pro版本或許更明智。

接著是Honor (榮耀) 在此價位段的代表X60。作者檢視後理解了為何設計可以是賣點。作者讓大家直接看這款手機的設計。

鏡頭模組上的文字意思是「矩陣」，但實際上這裡只有一個真正的鏡頭。規格參數看起來不錯，但在實際使用中，它的性能並不算強勁。

「無損3倍變焦」功能在處理數據時有明顯的延遲。處理十億像素的數據對其CPU來說顯然是個極限挑戰。

這款Honor手機最大的亮點可能是它的軟體。作者不確定他們是否忘記精簡功能，但基本上，Honor大多數的旗艦功能都在這裡，只是被硬塞進來了。

例如「魔術大門」，理論上可以使用，但速度... 看看這個速度。

「鷹眼精彩抓拍」功能開啟後確實會自動抓拍，但反應時間... 只能說非常悠閒。

還有三指下滑實現的全局收藏、用於執行雙系統的「平行空間」、甚至是號稱「深度思考」並搭載Yoyo AI助理的「智慧膠囊」，這些旗艦功能應有盡有。

就連下拉通知中心的動畫，那個帶有時間顯示的「duang」效果，他們甚至都沒有移除。考慮到大多數入門手機甚至沒有返回桌面的動畫，這可以說是非常獨特。

優點是它保留了幾乎所有旗艦手機的軟體功能。缺點是，所有這些功能可能會導致手機更加卡頓。所以... 這到底是好事還是壞事呢？

最後是OPPO的入門級產品，它們確實符合某些刻板印象。作者提到的是OPPO A5 Active Version，基本上是一個更便宜的版本。

標誌性的OPPO綠色美學、設計、質感，即使在這個價位也保持了高雅。看看那個手機殼！它讓那些基本的透明殼顯得無比無聊。他們甚至為防摔設計了吸震氣囊。

OPPO在這個價位的手機理念似乎是「含蓄的力量」。作者的手機可能有點卡頓，但它擁有頂級的防水性能，通過了所有能通過的認證。為什麼要列出這麼多認證？作者解釋說，防水等級不像遊戲升級，它們是需要獨立滿足的不同標準。

而且作者購買這款手機時，甚至附贈了進水保固。這真是個不錯的優惠。作者不禁問，旗艦機什麼時候也能提供這樣的保固？畢竟，再多的認證都不如實際的進水保固來得實在。

之前作者提到了Vivo的「專業模式」。OPPO也有一個對應的功能，叫做「戶外動力模式」。功能非常相似，但這裡有一個有趣的亮點：點擊一個連結可以免費租借行動電源。

深入了解後發現，一些OPPO門店提供快充行動電源租借服務。這感覺像是一個週末逛街的實用福利，可以免費借用行動電源，並且與你的OPPO帳號綁定。作者認為這種「服務」導向的競爭方式非常值得提倡。

作者也補充說，如果你使用其他品牌的手機，不用擔心，他整理了一份指南，教你如何查詢不同品牌帳號綁定的服務和權益。只需按照步驟操作，就能看到你符合哪些福利資格。作者提到，不同品牌之間的服務差異其實相當大。

總結

作者認為這差不多就是本期影片的全部內容了。他好奇這些手機在實際使用中是否符合觀眾的預期。在接觸並測試這些入門設備之前，作者以為到了2025年，流暢性能對任何智慧型手機來說都會是基本要求。結果證明，事實遠非如此。

雖然它們仍然會有些卡頓，但製造商似乎正在擺脫「萬金油」的心態，轉而專注於打造真正「有用」的裝置，回歸本質，將智慧型手機視為它們本應是「工具」。這樣做的結果其實相當有趣。

作者最後思考，如果旗艦手機也能稍微放下那種「無所不能」的執念... 當然，可以保留那些頂級Ultra機型。

================================================

Have you guys ever thought about. today in 2025. what it's like to use a new smartphone. that costs just 150 dollars or so? Just imagine a phone. getting rid of the so-called excess performance of flagship phones,. removing the useless cameras,. ditching the voice assistant that you hardly ever use,. and adding a big battery,. and a speaker,. what would that be like? Could that be considered a telephone? But before I bought them all back,. I didn't expect. that phones at this price. wouldn't just blindly follow the flagship's obsession with imaging. As the product managers have a limited budget,. their thinking will actually be clearer. These phones. are actually more interesting than many flagships. I brought back all the new models. from OPPO, vivo, Xiaomi and Honor. that are available at this price of about 150 dollars,. just to have some fun and show you. This video isn't a horizontal comparison. It's just a chat with you all about these phones. to see what's interesting about them. So get your seats ready. and let's get started. When you put down the flagship phone. and pick up these phones priced about 150 dollars,. you'll find that the experience is completely different from what you imagined. These phones, even in 2025,. haven't become smooth and lag-free. because of some technology being passed down. On the contrary,. it's the exact opposite.

As for these phones,. from my own use,. the return animation isn't necessarily available,. apps will definitely lag if you open too many,. the camera lags as soon as you turn it on,. and the preview window is like there's a wireless connection delay. You could say that after using these for a while and going back to a flagship,. everything feels like an iPhone. But the manufacturers are all masters of ideas. Let's start with vivo. They've released quite a few phones at this price range. Basically any kind of phone can be put into the Y series. For example, the Pro. and the GT are still reasonable. But the Y300t, Y300i, Y37m,. tim?? This is the Y300 costing about 150 dollars,. and this is the iPhone priced about 1400 dollars. Let me show you the differences in sound between them. Let's listen to the Y300. This is a bit unfair to the iPhone. I need to find a worthy competitor for it. Moto's XT1650. Its speaker is even added later. This is its speaker. The phone itself. is as thin as. a blade. Let's listen to Moto's sound. This is a family-style design,. a stand full of vintage charm. Well, these are all cost-saving parts. But what's the result? They actually managed to squeeze in a speaker. in addition to the dual speakers. So when you listen to the sound,. you can even feel some vibration following the sound to the back.

It's like holding a speaker. Loud! Super loud! I took the phone downstairs to listen to the sound of Shenzhen. Right in the middle of the road,. the live sound is like this. And when you turn up the volume, it sounds like this. I also tried using its speakerphone to make a call. In this noisy condition,. the difference between two phones is really about hearing and not hearing. No one likes listening to others' loudspeakers on the subway, right? But if this phone is playing loudspeaker right opposite you,. face-to-face... Even though he is the person who is watching videos,. the sound is all for you. It's just crazy. And this vivo phone has a feature that flagships don't have,. the professional mode. It's aimed at people with outdoor needs. Simply put, it's about high brightness,. default speakerphone and network grabbing,. treating the phone as a tool. The default speakerphone actually saves you the extra click. that you need to make every time you answer a call. As for brightness,. the description is like this. I tested it. and it didn't reach the expected unlock limit. There's a bit of a gap compared to the flagship. So I also tested. whether it could last longer in a high-temperature environment. The result was under the scorching of the studio light,. it's high brightness can last a little longer. It shows a bit of thoughtful design within the hardware limitations. For those who have experienced using a phone outdoors,. this kind of hard moment, you can type "1" in the comment. I thought of something interesting.

What if we replace one of the lenses of the flagship with a speaker,. losing one native focal length. to improve the sound quality of the flagship? Would you guys be willing to buy such a phone? This one is the Redmi Note 14. It's the only one among these phones that still offers a 6GB memory option,. but it's only 7 dollars cheaper. Considering the smoothness of this one. is like this,. if possible,. it's better to choose one with a larger memory. At first glance, this phone is actually quite ordinary. It gives a sense of familiarity. The only infrared. The main camera has optical image stabilization. The OLED screen has an in-screen fingerprint sensor. The 3.5mm headphone jack is also available. I only realized when I was changing the SIM card. that it can also insert a TF card. Wow. The low-speed card that can't be used in Switch2 has finally found a new home. This Xiaomi phone. is a typical budget phone around $150. It's got a headphone jack and a microSD card slot—features we used to love on flagship phones back in the day. But this model,. probably because it was released a bit early,. doesn't really stack up against the competition. in terms of main hardware specs. at this price point. If you're set on Xiaomi,. maybe don't stick too rigidly to your budget. Splashing a little extra for the Pro version might be a smarter move. Now, Honor's representative in this category is the X60. After checking it out,. I get why design can be a selling point. I'll just shut up. and let you take a look.

The word on this module. means matrix. But there's actually only one real camera lens here. The specs look decent on paper,. but in real-world use... let's just say it's not exactly a powerhouse. The "lossless 3x zoom" has this noticeable lag. when processing data. Handling a billion pixels of data. must really be pushing the CPU to its limits. The biggest standout feature on this Honor phone. might be its software. I'm not sure if they forgot to strip some features or what,. but basically, most of Honor's flagship features. are here... kind of. shoehorned in. Like the "Magic Portal" you can technically use it,. But... look at this speed. The "Eagle Eye" auto-capture. It does auto-capture. after you turn it on,. but the reaction time is... let's say leisurely. The three-finger swipe for global collection. The parallel space for running dual systems. Even the "Smart Capsule" with its AI assistant Yoyo that's supposed to "think deeply" they're all here. Even the animation when you pull down the notification center,. that "duang" effect with the time display. they didn't even bother removing it. Considering most budget phones don't even have animations for returning to the home screen,. this is... quite something. On the plus side, it retains almost all the software features of flagship phones.

On the downside,. all these features might be making the phone lag more. So... is that a good thing or a bad thing? OPPO's budget offerings... well, they do fit some stereotypes. OPPO A5. Active Version. it's essentially a cheaper variant. That signature OPPO green aesthetic,. the design,. the texture. they've managed to keep it classy even at this price point. And check out that phone case! It makes those basic transparent cases look downright boring. They've even included shock-absorbing airbags for drop protection. OPPO's philosophy for phones in this range seems to be "subtle power." Sure, my phone might lag a bit,. but it's got top-notch water resistance. passed every certification they could throw at it. Why list so many certifications? Well, waterproof ratings aren't like leveling up in a game. They're different sets of standards. that need to be met individually. And when I bought this phone, they even threw in water damage warranty coverage. That's a pretty sweet deal. When are they gonna offer that for flagship models? After all. no amount of certifications beats actual warranty coverage for water damage. Earlier, I mentioned Vivo's "Professional Mode." OPPO has a counterpart. called "Outdoor Power Mode." The features are pretty similar,. but here's a fun twist:. clicking this link gets you free power bank rentals. Digging deeper,. it turns out some OPPO stores offer fast-charging power bank rentals. Not bad, right?

It feels like a handy perk for weekend shopping trips. you can borrow a power bank for free,. and it's all tied to your OPPO account. It's not just about power banks either; there are benefits like free screen protectors and other perks. I'm all for this kind of. service-focused approach to competition. Bring it on! Hey,. if you're using phones from other brands, don't worry. I've compiled a guide on how to check the benefits tied to your accounts across different brands. Just follow these steps. to see what perks you're eligible for. There are actually pretty big differences between brands. Feel free to share your findings in the comments. others who can't find the entrance don't miss out either. Well, that's about all for this episode. I wonder how. these phones stack up. against your expectations in real-world use. Before I got my hands on these budget devices and started testing them,. I thought that by 2025,. smooth performance would be a given for any smartphone. Turns out, that's far from the truth. Sure, they can still be a bit laggy,. but it seems like manufacturers are shifting away from the "jack-of-all-trades" mindset. they're focusing on making devices that are genuinely "useful," getting back to basics and treating smartphones as the tools they're meant to be. The results are actually pretty fun. I'm just thinking, if flagship phones could let go of that "do-it-all" obsession a bit too. I mean, sure, keep those top-tier Ultra models for photography enthusiasts. but couldn't we see some more interesting, niche devices emerge? I really hope the tech world can recapture that old magic of diversity and innovation. Looking at budget phones through today's lens,. in some ways of spreading the joy of technology to more people,. they're actually doing a better job than flagships. aren't they?

ok~ So that's all for this video.

If you find this video interesting. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time ~88.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kh6MxICBsZU

在2025年的今天，一千來塊錢能買到的新手機，用起來會是什麼體驗

F O L L O W M E

Weibo: @大狸子切切里

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/471303350

#數碼 #開箱 #手機 #vivo #小米
item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解2025年左右150美元級別入門智慧型手機的真實使用體驗與獨特之處。
  • 比較不同手機品牌（Vivo、小米/紅米、Honor、OPPO）在有限預算下如何開發差異化功能與服務。
  • 探討製造商在入門級市場如何從「萬金油」轉向強調特定實用功能，將手機視為「工具」的設計理念。

摘要

這段影片的作者探討了一個引人入勝的問題：在2025年，使用一款僅需約150美元的新智慧型手機會是什麼樣子？作者想像，如果這樣的裝置捨棄了旗艦手機所謂的「過剩效能」、移除不常用的鏡頭、放棄很少使用的語音助理，轉而加入大電池和大喇叭，它還會被視為一款手機嗎？

然而，在實際購入這些手機之前，作者並沒有預料到這個價位的手機並非只是盲目追隨旗艦機對影像的執著。由於產品經理的預算有限，他們的思路反而更加清晰。作者發現，這些手機實際上比許多旗艦機更加有趣。

作者一口氣買回了OPPO、vivo、小米和Honor等品牌在這個約150美元價位的所有新款機型，目的是為了好玩並向大家展示。他強調這段影片不是橫向對比，而是想和觀眾們聊聊這些手機的趣味之處。

當放下旗艦手機，拿起這些約150美元價位的手機時，作者發現實際體驗與想像的完全不同。即使到了2025年，這些手機也並未因為技術下放而變得流暢無卡頓；恰恰相反，情況是截然不同的。

就作者自己的使用體驗而言，這些手機的返回動畫不一定流暢，打開太多App肯定會卡頓，相機一打開就卡，預覽畫面就像有無線連接延遲一樣。

作者開玩笑說，在使用這些手機一段時間後再回到旗艦機，會覺得一切都變得像iPhone一樣流暢。但作者也提到，各家製造商都是充滿想法的大師。

各品牌入門手機的獨特之處

首先來看vivo。他們在這個價位段推出了相當多的機型，基本上任何類型的手機都可以被歸入Y系列。作者提到其中一款約150美元的型號是Y300。

作者將Y300與約1400美元的iPhone進行了聲音比較，但他承認這對iPhone不太公平，並找來了另一款手機Moto XT1650作為對手。

Moto XT1650的喇叭是後來加裝的，手機本身薄如刀鋒。

作者試聽了Moto的聲音，然後回到正題，比較了Vivo Y300的聲音表現。

vivo的設計充滿復古魅力，雖然使用了節約成本的零件，但結果是除了雙喇叭之外，竟然還能塞進一個額外的喇叭。因此，在聽聲音時，甚至能感覺到聲音帶來的背部震動，就像手握一個喇叭一樣。

Y300的喇叭聲音非常大聲！作者甚至拿著手機到樓下測試，在深圳的路邊，實時聲音聽起來就像是外放一樣，把音量調大後更是驚人。

作者還嘗試用其擴音器進行通話。在嘈雜的環境下，兩部手機的區別真的就是聽得到和聽不到的差別。他描述了在地鐵裡這種手機外放的情景，如果正對著你播放，聲音會全部傳給你，簡直「瘋狂」。

這款vivo手機還有一個旗艦機沒有的功能——「專業模式」。這個模式針對有戶外需求的人群，簡單來說就是高亮度、預設擴音和優先網路連接，將手機視為一個「工具」。

預設擴音功能省去了每次接聽電話都要點擊擴音的步驟，十分方便。關於亮度，產品描述是這樣的。

作者進行了測試，發現亮度並未達到解鎖極限，與旗艦機存在差距。因此，他也測試了它在高溫環境下是否能持續更久。結果顯示，在攝影棚燈光照射下，它的高亮度確實能持續更長時間，這體現了在硬體限制下的巧妙設計思考。

作者問觀眾是否有過在戶外使用手機遇到困難的時刻，並請有此經驗的在評論區輸入「1」。

作者接著提出了一個有趣的想法：如果旗艦機犧牲一顆鏡頭，用喇叭來取代，損失一個原生焦段，但大幅提升音質，觀眾是否願意購買這樣的手機？

接下來是紅米 Note 14。這是這些手機中唯一還提供6GB記憶體選項的，儘管只便宜了7美元。考慮到這款手機的流暢度表現一般，作者建議如果可能，最好選擇記憶體更大的版本。

初看之下，這款手機其實相當普通，給人一種熟悉的感覺。

它保留了許多傳統特點：唯一的紅外線遙控、主鏡頭支援光學防抖、OLED螢幕支援螢幕下指紋辨識、甚至還有3.5mm耳機孔。作者在換SIM卡時才發現它還支援插入TF卡（microSD卡）。

作者開玩笑說，無法在Switch 2上使用的低速記憶卡終於找到了新歸宿。這款小米手機是典型的150美元價位入門機，擁有過去旗艦機喜愛的耳機孔和microSD卡槽等功能。但作者認為，或許因為發布時間較早，這款機型在主硬體規格上與同價位的競爭對手相比並不出色。如果堅持選擇小米，作者建議不要太死守預算，多花一點錢購買Pro版本或許更明智。

接著是Honor (榮耀) 在此價位段的代表X60。作者檢視後理解了為何設計可以是賣點。作者讓大家直接看這款手機的設計。

鏡頭模組上的文字意思是「矩陣」，但實際上這裡只有一個真正的鏡頭。規格參數看起來不錯，但在實際使用中，它的性能並不算強勁。

「無損3倍變焦」功能在處理數據時有明顯的延遲。處理十億像素的數據對其CPU來說顯然是個極限挑戰。

這款Honor手機最大的亮點可能是它的軟體。作者不確定他們是否忘記精簡功能，但基本上，Honor大多數的旗艦功能都在這裡，只是被硬塞進來了。

例如「魔術大門」，理論上可以使用，但速度... 看看這個速度。

「鷹眼精彩抓拍」功能開啟後確實會自動抓拍，但反應時間... 只能說非常悠閒。

還有三指下滑實現的全局收藏、用於執行雙系統的「平行空間」、甚至是號稱「深度思考」並搭載Yoyo AI助理的「智慧膠囊」，這些旗艦功能應有盡有。

就連下拉通知中心的動畫，那個帶有時間顯示的「duang」效果，他們甚至都沒有移除。考慮到大多數入門手機甚至沒有返回桌面的動畫，這可以說是非常獨特。

優點是它保留了幾乎所有旗艦手機的軟體功能。缺點是，所有這些功能可能會導致手機更加卡頓。所以... 這到底是好事還是壞事呢？

最後是OPPO的入門級產品，它們確實符合某些刻板印象。作者提到的是OPPO A5 Active Version，基本上是一個更便宜的版本。

標誌性的OPPO綠色美學、設計、質感，即使在這個價位也保持了高雅。看看那個手機殼！它讓那些基本的透明殼顯得無比無聊。他們甚至為防摔設計了吸震氣囊。

OPPO在這個價位的手機理念似乎是「含蓄的力量」。作者的手機可能有點卡頓，但它擁有頂級的防水性能，通過了所有能通過的認證。為什麼要列出這麼多認證？作者解釋說，防水等級不像遊戲升級，它們是需要獨立滿足的不同標準。

而且作者購買這款手機時，甚至附贈了進水保固。這真是個不錯的優惠。作者不禁問，旗艦機什麼時候也能提供這樣的保固？畢竟，再多的認證都不如實際的進水保固來得實在。

之前作者提到了Vivo的「專業模式」。OPPO也有一個對應的功能，叫做「戶外動力模式」。功能非常相似，但這裡有一個有趣的亮點：點擊一個連結可以免費租借行動電源。

深入了解後發現，一些OPPO門店提供快充行動電源租借服務。這感覺像是一個週末逛街的實用福利，可以免費借用行動電源，並且與你的OPPO帳號綁定。作者認為這種「服務」導向的競爭方式非常值得提倡。

作者也補充說，如果你使用其他品牌的手機，不用擔心，他整理了一份指南，教你如何查詢不同品牌帳號綁定的服務和權益。只需按照步驟操作，就能看到你符合哪些福利資格。作者提到，不同品牌之間的服務差異其實相當大。

總結

作者認為這差不多就是本期影片的全部內容了。他好奇這些手機在實際使用中是否符合觀眾的預期。在接觸並測試這些入門設備之前，作者以為到了2025年，流暢性能對任何智慧型手機來說都會是基本要求。結果證明，事實遠非如此。

雖然它們仍然會有些卡頓，但製造商似乎正在擺脫「萬金油」的心態，轉而專注於打造真正「有用」的裝置，回歸本質，將智慧型手機視為它們本應是「工具」。這樣做的結果其實相當有趣。

作者最後思考，如果旗艦手機也能稍微放下那種「無所不能」的執念... 當然，可以保留那些頂級Ultra機型。

================================================

Have you guys ever thought about. today in 2025. what it's like to use a new smartphone. that costs just 150 dollars or so? Just imagine a phone. getting rid of the so-called excess performance of flagship phones,. removing the useless cameras,. ditching the voice assistant that you hardly ever use,. and adding a big battery,. and a speaker,. what would that be like? Could that be considered a telephone? But before I bought them all back,. I didn't expect. that phones at this price. wouldn't just blindly follow the flagship's obsession with imaging. As the product managers have a limited budget,. their thinking will actually be clearer. These phones. are actually more interesting than many flagships. I brought back all the new models. from OPPO, vivo, Xiaomi and Honor. that are available at this price of about 150 dollars,. just to have some fun and show you. This video isn't a horizontal comparison. It's just a chat with you all about these phones. to see what's interesting about them. So get your seats ready. and let's get started. When you put down the flagship phone. and pick up these phones priced about 150 dollars,. you'll find that the experience is completely different from what you imagined. These phones, even in 2025,. haven't become smooth and lag-free. because of some technology being passed down. On the contrary,. it's the exact opposite.

As for these phones,. from my own use,. the return animation isn't necessarily available,. apps will definitely lag if you open too many,. the camera lags as soon as you turn it on,. and the preview window is like there's a wireless connection delay. You could say that after using these for a while and going back to a flagship,. everything feels like an iPhone. But the manufacturers are all masters of ideas. Let's start with vivo. They've released quite a few phones at this price range. Basically any kind of phone can be put into the Y series. For example, the Pro. and the GT are still reasonable. But the Y300t, Y300i, Y37m,. tim?? This is the Y300 costing about 150 dollars,. and this is the iPhone priced about 1400 dollars. Let me show you the differences in sound between them. Let's listen to the Y300. This is a bit unfair to the iPhone. I need to find a worthy competitor for it. Moto's XT1650. Its speaker is even added later. This is its speaker. The phone itself. is as thin as. a blade. Let's listen to Moto's sound. This is a family-style design,. a stand full of vintage charm. Well, these are all cost-saving parts. But what's the result? They actually managed to squeeze in a speaker. in addition to the dual speakers. So when you listen to the sound,. you can even feel some vibration following the sound to the back.

It's like holding a speaker. Loud! Super loud! I took the phone downstairs to listen to the sound of Shenzhen. Right in the middle of the road,. the live sound is like this. And when you turn up the volume, it sounds like this. I also tried using its speakerphone to make a call. In this noisy condition,. the difference between two phones is really about hearing and not hearing. No one likes listening to others' loudspeakers on the subway, right? But if this phone is playing loudspeaker right opposite you,. face-to-face... Even though he is the person who is watching videos,. the sound is all for you. It's just crazy. And this vivo phone has a feature that flagships don't have,. the professional mode. It's aimed at people with outdoor needs. Simply put, it's about high brightness,. default speakerphone and network grabbing,. treating the phone as a tool. The default speakerphone actually saves you the extra click. that you need to make every time you answer a call. As for brightness,. the description is like this. I tested it. and it didn't reach the expected unlock limit. There's a bit of a gap compared to the flagship. So I also tested. whether it could last longer in a high-temperature environment. The result was under the scorching of the studio light,. it's high brightness can last a little longer. It shows a bit of thoughtful design within the hardware limitations. For those who have experienced using a phone outdoors,. this kind of hard moment, you can type "1" in the comment. I thought of something interesting.

What if we replace one of the lenses of the flagship with a speaker,. losing one native focal length. to improve the sound quality of the flagship? Would you guys be willing to buy such a phone? This one is the Redmi Note 14. It's the only one among these phones that still offers a 6GB memory option,. but it's only 7 dollars cheaper. Considering the smoothness of this one. is like this,. if possible,. it's better to choose one with a larger memory. At first glance, this phone is actually quite ordinary. It gives a sense of familiarity. The only infrared. The main camera has optical image stabilization. The OLED screen has an in-screen fingerprint sensor. The 3.5mm headphone jack is also available. I only realized when I was changing the SIM card. that it can also insert a TF card. Wow. The low-speed card that can't be used in Switch2 has finally found a new home. This Xiaomi phone. is a typical budget phone around $150. It's got a headphone jack and a microSD card slot—features we used to love on flagship phones back in the day. But this model,. probably because it was released a bit early,. doesn't really stack up against the competition. in terms of main hardware specs. at this price point. If you're set on Xiaomi,. maybe don't stick too rigidly to your budget. Splashing a little extra for the Pro version might be a smarter move. Now, Honor's representative in this category is the X60. After checking it out,. I get why design can be a selling point. I'll just shut up. and let you take a look.

The word on this module. means matrix. But there's actually only one real camera lens here. The specs look decent on paper,. but in real-world use... let's just say it's not exactly a powerhouse. The "lossless 3x zoom" has this noticeable lag. when processing data. Handling a billion pixels of data. must really be pushing the CPU to its limits. The biggest standout feature on this Honor phone. might be its software. I'm not sure if they forgot to strip some features or what,. but basically, most of Honor's flagship features. are here... kind of. shoehorned in. Like the "Magic Portal" you can technically use it,. But... look at this speed. The "Eagle Eye" auto-capture. It does auto-capture. after you turn it on,. but the reaction time is... let's say leisurely. The three-finger swipe for global collection. The parallel space for running dual systems. Even the "Smart Capsule" with its AI assistant Yoyo that's supposed to "think deeply" they're all here. Even the animation when you pull down the notification center,. that "duang" effect with the time display. they didn't even bother removing it. Considering most budget phones don't even have animations for returning to the home screen,. this is... quite something. On the plus side, it retains almost all the software features of flagship phones.

On the downside,. all these features might be making the phone lag more. So... is that a good thing or a bad thing? OPPO's budget offerings... well, they do fit some stereotypes. OPPO A5. Active Version. it's essentially a cheaper variant. That signature OPPO green aesthetic,. the design,. the texture. they've managed to keep it classy even at this price point. And check out that phone case! It makes those basic transparent cases look downright boring. They've even included shock-absorbing airbags for drop protection. OPPO's philosophy for phones in this range seems to be "subtle power." Sure, my phone might lag a bit,. but it's got top-notch water resistance. passed every certification they could throw at it. Why list so many certifications? Well, waterproof ratings aren't like leveling up in a game. They're different sets of standards. that need to be met individually. And when I bought this phone, they even threw in water damage warranty coverage. That's a pretty sweet deal. When are they gonna offer that for flagship models? After all. no amount of certifications beats actual warranty coverage for water damage. Earlier, I mentioned Vivo's "Professional Mode." OPPO has a counterpart. called "Outdoor Power Mode." The features are pretty similar,. but here's a fun twist:. clicking this link gets you free power bank rentals. Digging deeper,. it turns out some OPPO stores offer fast-charging power bank rentals. Not bad, right?

It feels like a handy perk for weekend shopping trips. you can borrow a power bank for free,. and it's all tied to your OPPO account. It's not just about power banks either; there are benefits like free screen protectors and other perks. I'm all for this kind of. service-focused approach to competition. Bring it on! Hey,. if you're using phones from other brands, don't worry. I've compiled a guide on how to check the benefits tied to your accounts across different brands. Just follow these steps. to see what perks you're eligible for. There are actually pretty big differences between brands. Feel free to share your findings in the comments. others who can't find the entrance don't miss out either. Well, that's about all for this episode. I wonder how. these phones stack up. against your expectations in real-world use. Before I got my hands on these budget devices and started testing them,. I thought that by 2025,. smooth performance would be a given for any smartphone. Turns out, that's far from the truth. Sure, they can still be a bit laggy,. but it seems like manufacturers are shifting away from the "jack-of-all-trades" mindset. they're focusing on making devices that are genuinely "useful," getting back to basics and treating smartphones as the tools they're meant to be. The results are actually pretty fun. I'm just thinking, if flagship phones could let go of that "do-it-all" obsession a bit too. I mean, sure, keep those top-tier Ultra models for photography enthusiasts. but couldn't we see some more interesting, niche devices emerge? I really hope the tech world can recapture that old magic of diversity and innovation. Looking at budget phones through today's lens,. in some ways of spreading the joy of technology to more people,. they're actually doing a better job than flagships. aren't they?

ok~ So that's all for this video.

If you find this video interesting. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time ~88.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kh6MxICBsZU

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

在2025年的今天，一千來塊錢能買到的新手機，用起來會是什麼體驗

F O L L O W M E

Weibo: @大狸子切切里

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/471303350

#數碼 #開箱 #手機 #vivo #小米
item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解2025年左右150美元級別入門智慧型手機的真實使用體驗與獨特之處。
  • 比較不同手機品牌（Vivo、小米/紅米、Honor、OPPO）在有限預算下如何開發差異化功能與服務。
  • 探討製造商在入門級市場如何從「萬金油」轉向強調特定實用功能，將手機視為「工具」的設計理念。

摘要

這段影片的作者探討了一個引人入勝的問題：在2025年，使用一款僅需約150美元的新智慧型手機會是什麼樣子？作者想像，如果這樣的裝置捨棄了旗艦手機所謂的「過剩效能」、移除不常用的鏡頭、放棄很少使用的語音助理，轉而加入大電池和大喇叭，它還會被視為一款手機嗎？

然而，在實際購入這些手機之前，作者並沒有預料到這個價位的手機並非只是盲目追隨旗艦機對影像的執著。由於產品經理的預算有限，他們的思路反而更加清晰。作者發現，這些手機實際上比許多旗艦機更加有趣。

作者一口氣買回了OPPO、vivo、小米和Honor等品牌在這個約150美元價位的所有新款機型，目的是為了好玩並向大家展示。他強調這段影片不是橫向對比，而是想和觀眾們聊聊這些手機的趣味之處。

當放下旗艦手機，拿起這些約150美元價位的手機時，作者發現實際體驗與想像的完全不同。即使到了2025年，這些手機也並未因為技術下放而變得流暢無卡頓；恰恰相反，情況是截然不同的。

就作者自己的使用體驗而言，這些手機的返回動畫不一定流暢，打開太多App肯定會卡頓，相機一打開就卡，預覽畫面就像有無線連接延遲一樣。

作者開玩笑說，在使用這些手機一段時間後再回到旗艦機，會覺得一切都變得像iPhone一樣流暢。但作者也提到，各家製造商都是充滿想法的大師。

各品牌入門手機的獨特之處

首先來看vivo。他們在這個價位段推出了相當多的機型，基本上任何類型的手機都可以被歸入Y系列。作者提到其中一款約150美元的型號是Y300。

作者將Y300與約1400美元的iPhone進行了聲音比較，但他承認這對iPhone不太公平，並找來了另一款手機Moto XT1650作為對手。

Moto XT1650的喇叭是後來加裝的，手機本身薄如刀鋒。

作者試聽了Moto的聲音，然後回到正題，比較了Vivo Y300的聲音表現。

vivo的設計充滿復古魅力，雖然使用了節約成本的零件，但結果是除了雙喇叭之外，竟然還能塞進一個額外的喇叭。因此，在聽聲音時，甚至能感覺到聲音帶來的背部震動，就像手握一個喇叭一樣。

Y300的喇叭聲音非常大聲！作者甚至拿著手機到樓下測試，在深圳的路邊，實時聲音聽起來就像是外放一樣，把音量調大後更是驚人。

作者還嘗試用其擴音器進行通話。在嘈雜的環境下，兩部手機的區別真的就是聽得到和聽不到的差別。他描述了在地鐵裡這種手機外放的情景，如果正對著你播放，聲音會全部傳給你，簡直「瘋狂」。

這款vivo手機還有一個旗艦機沒有的功能——「專業模式」。這個模式針對有戶外需求的人群，簡單來說就是高亮度、預設擴音和優先網路連接，將手機視為一個「工具」。

預設擴音功能省去了每次接聽電話都要點擊擴音的步驟，十分方便。關於亮度，產品描述是這樣的。

作者進行了測試，發現亮度並未達到解鎖極限，與旗艦機存在差距。因此，他也測試了它在高溫環境下是否能持續更久。結果顯示，在攝影棚燈光照射下，它的高亮度確實能持續更長時間，這體現了在硬體限制下的巧妙設計思考。

作者問觀眾是否有過在戶外使用手機遇到困難的時刻，並請有此經驗的在評論區輸入「1」。

作者接著提出了一個有趣的想法：如果旗艦機犧牲一顆鏡頭，用喇叭來取代，損失一個原生焦段，但大幅提升音質，觀眾是否願意購買這樣的手機？

接下來是紅米 Note 14。這是這些手機中唯一還提供6GB記憶體選項的，儘管只便宜了7美元。考慮到這款手機的流暢度表現一般，作者建議如果可能，最好選擇記憶體更大的版本。

初看之下，這款手機其實相當普通，給人一種熟悉的感覺。

它保留了許多傳統特點：唯一的紅外線遙控、主鏡頭支援光學防抖、OLED螢幕支援螢幕下指紋辨識、甚至還有3.5mm耳機孔。作者在換SIM卡時才發現它還支援插入TF卡（microSD卡）。

作者開玩笑說，無法在Switch 2上使用的低速記憶卡終於找到了新歸宿。這款小米手機是典型的150美元價位入門機，擁有過去旗艦機喜愛的耳機孔和microSD卡槽等功能。但作者認為，或許因為發布時間較早，這款機型在主硬體規格上與同價位的競爭對手相比並不出色。如果堅持選擇小米，作者建議不要太死守預算，多花一點錢購買Pro版本或許更明智。

接著是Honor (榮耀) 在此價位段的代表X60。作者檢視後理解了為何設計可以是賣點。作者讓大家直接看這款手機的設計。

鏡頭模組上的文字意思是「矩陣」，但實際上這裡只有一個真正的鏡頭。規格參數看起來不錯，但在實際使用中，它的性能並不算強勁。

「無損3倍變焦」功能在處理數據時有明顯的延遲。處理十億像素的數據對其CPU來說顯然是個極限挑戰。

這款Honor手機最大的亮點可能是它的軟體。作者不確定他們是否忘記精簡功能，但基本上，Honor大多數的旗艦功能都在這裡，只是被硬塞進來了。

例如「魔術大門」，理論上可以使用，但速度... 看看這個速度。

「鷹眼精彩抓拍」功能開啟後確實會自動抓拍，但反應時間... 只能說非常悠閒。

還有三指下滑實現的全局收藏、用於執行雙系統的「平行空間」、甚至是號稱「深度思考」並搭載Yoyo AI助理的「智慧膠囊」，這些旗艦功能應有盡有。

就連下拉通知中心的動畫，那個帶有時間顯示的「duang」效果，他們甚至都沒有移除。考慮到大多數入門手機甚至沒有返回桌面的動畫，這可以說是非常獨特。

優點是它保留了幾乎所有旗艦手機的軟體功能。缺點是，所有這些功能可能會導致手機更加卡頓。所以... 這到底是好事還是壞事呢？

最後是OPPO的入門級產品，它們確實符合某些刻板印象。作者提到的是OPPO A5 Active Version，基本上是一個更便宜的版本。

標誌性的OPPO綠色美學、設計、質感，即使在這個價位也保持了高雅。看看那個手機殼！它讓那些基本的透明殼顯得無比無聊。他們甚至為防摔設計了吸震氣囊。

OPPO在這個價位的手機理念似乎是「含蓄的力量」。作者的手機可能有點卡頓，但它擁有頂級的防水性能，通過了所有能通過的認證。為什麼要列出這麼多認證？作者解釋說，防水等級不像遊戲升級，它們是需要獨立滿足的不同標準。

而且作者購買這款手機時，甚至附贈了進水保固。這真是個不錯的優惠。作者不禁問，旗艦機什麼時候也能提供這樣的保固？畢竟，再多的認證都不如實際的進水保固來得實在。

之前作者提到了Vivo的「專業模式」。OPPO也有一個對應的功能，叫做「戶外動力模式」。功能非常相似，但這裡有一個有趣的亮點：點擊一個連結可以免費租借行動電源。

深入了解後發現，一些OPPO門店提供快充行動電源租借服務。這感覺像是一個週末逛街的實用福利，可以免費借用行動電源，並且與你的OPPO帳號綁定。作者認為這種「服務」導向的競爭方式非常值得提倡。

作者也補充說，如果你使用其他品牌的手機，不用擔心，他整理了一份指南，教你如何查詢不同品牌帳號綁定的服務和權益。只需按照步驟操作，就能看到你符合哪些福利資格。作者提到，不同品牌之間的服務差異其實相當大。

總結

作者認為這差不多就是本期影片的全部內容了。他好奇這些手機在實際使用中是否符合觀眾的預期。在接觸並測試這些入門設備之前，作者以為到了2025年，流暢性能對任何智慧型手機來說都會是基本要求。結果證明，事實遠非如此。

雖然它們仍然會有些卡頓，但製造商似乎正在擺脫「萬金油」的心態，轉而專注於打造真正「有用」的裝置，回歸本質，將智慧型手機視為它們本應是「工具」。這樣做的結果其實相當有趣。

作者最後思考，如果旗艦手機也能稍微放下那種「無所不能」的執念... 當然，可以保留那些頂級Ultra機型。

================================================

This one is the Redmi Note 14. It's the only one among these phones that still offers a 6GB memory option,. but it's only 7 dollars cheaper. Considering the smoothness of this one. is like this,. if possible,. it's better to choose one with a larger memory. At first glance, this phone is actually quite ordinary. It gives a sense of familiarity. The only infrared. The main camera has optical image stabilization. The OLED screen has an in-screen fingerprint sensor. The 3.5mm headphone jack is also available. I only realized when I was changing the SIM card. that it can also insert a TF card. Wow. The low-speed card that can't be used in Switch2 has finally found a new home. This Xiaomi phone. is a typical budget phone around $150. It's got a headphone jack and a microSD card slot—features we used to love on flagship phones back in the day. But this model,. probably because it was released a bit early,. doesn't really stack up against the competition. in terms of main hardware specs. at this price point. If you're set on Xiaomi,. maybe don't stick too rigidly to your budget. Splashing a little extra for the Pro version might be a smarter move. Now, Honor's representative in this category is the X60. After checking it out,. I get why design can be a selling point. I'll just shut up. and let you take a look.

The word on this module. means matrix. But there's actually only one real camera lens here. The specs look decent on paper,. but in real-world use... let's just say it's not exactly a powerhouse. The "lossless 3x zoom" has this noticeable lag. when processing data. Handling a billion pixels of data. must really be pushing the CPU to its limits. The biggest standout feature on this Honor phone. might be its software. I'm not sure if they forgot to strip some features or what,. but basically, most of Honor's flagship features. are here... kind of. shoehorned in. Like the "Magic Portal" you can technically use it,. But... look at this speed. The "Eagle Eye" auto-capture. It does auto-capture. after you turn it on,. but the reaction time is... let's say leisurely. The three-finger swipe for global collection. The parallel space for running dual systems. Even the "Smart Capsule" with its AI assistant Yoyo that's supposed to "think deeply" they're all here. Even the animation when you pull down the notification center,. that "duang" effect with the time display. they didn't even bother removing it. Considering most budget phones don't even have animations for returning to the home screen,. this is... quite something. On the plus side, it retains almost all the software features of flagship phones.

On the downside,. all these features might be making the phone lag more. So... is that a good thing or a bad thing? OPPO's budget offerings... well, they do fit some stereotypes. OPPO A5. Active Version. it's essentially a cheaper variant. That signature OPPO green aesthetic,. the design,. the texture. they've managed to keep it classy even at this price point. And check out that phone case! It makes those basic transparent cases look downright boring. They've even included shock-absorbing airbags for drop protection. OPPO's philosophy for phones in this range seems to be "subtle power." Sure, my phone might lag a bit,. but it's got top-notch water resistance. passed every certification they could throw at it. Why list so many certifications? Well, waterproof ratings aren't like leveling up in a game. They're different sets of standards. that need to be met individually. And when I bought this phone, they even threw in water damage warranty coverage. That's a pretty sweet deal. When are they gonna offer that for flagship models? After all. no amount of certifications beats actual warranty coverage for water damage. Earlier, I mentioned Vivo's "Professional Mode." OPPO has a counterpart. called "Outdoor Power Mode." The features are pretty similar,. but here's a fun twist:. clicking this link gets you free power bank rentals. Digging deeper,. it turns out some OPPO stores offer fast-charging power bank rentals. Not bad, right?

It feels like a handy perk for weekend shopping trips. you can borrow a power bank for free,. and it's all tied to your OPPO account. It's not just about power banks either; there are benefits like free screen protectors and other perks. I'm all for this kind of. service-focused approach to competition. Bring it on! Hey,. if you're using phones from other brands, don't worry. I've compiled a guide on how to check the benefits tied to your accounts across different brands. Just follow these steps. to see what perks you're eligible for. There are actually pretty big differences between brands. Feel free to share your findings in the comments. others who can't find the entrance don't miss out either. Well, that's about all for this episode. I wonder how. these phones stack up. against your expectations in real-world use. Before I got my hands on these budget devices and started testing them,. I thought that by 2025,. smooth performance would be a given for any smartphone. Turns out, that's far from the truth. Sure, they can still be a bit laggy,. but it seems like manufacturers are shifting away from the "jack-of-all-trades" mindset. they're focusing on making devices that are genuinely "useful," getting back to basics and treating smartphones as the tools they're meant to be. The results are actually pretty fun. I'm just thinking, if flagship phones could let go of that "do-it-all" obsession a bit too. I mean, sure, keep those top-tier Ultra models for photography enthusiasts. but couldn't we see some more interesting, niche devices emerge? I really hope the tech world can recapture that old magic of diversity and innovation. Looking at budget phones through today's lens,. in some ways of spreading the joy of technology to more people,. they're actually doing a better job than flagships. aren't they?

ok~ So that's all for this video.

If you find this video interesting. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time ~88.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kh6MxICBsZU

item.title: 買前必看！讓我來看看Switch2到底升級了啥？這一代升級你會買麼？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: 買前必看！讓我來看看Switch2到底升級了啥？這一代升級你會買麼？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由



  • 深入了解被譽為 Switch 2 的新機在效能、螢幕、手感等方面的具體提升與變化。

  • 詳細體驗並分析了新機在遊玩瑪利歐賽車、電馭叛客 2077 等遊戲時的流暢度與畫面表現，並與前代及 PS4 進行對比。

  • 介紹了新機的獨特新功能，如具爭議的 C 鍵 Game Chat、改進的 Joy-Con 設計、新的 MicroSD Express 卡槽等，提供購買前的必要資訊。



摘要


初步印象與外觀設計


作者對於即將試玩的新機感到非常興奮，尤其聽說這次 NS2 的效能有大幅提升，甚至比前代強了十倍，並超越了 PS4。新機的螢幕變得更大，並支援 HDR 和 120Hz 刷新率。作者特地前往香港參加了任天堂的試玩會，希望能親身體驗這些改進。



拿到新機後，作者首先注意到其整體外觀變得更加圓潤，手感也感覺更為飽滿。雖然機身厚度並未增加，但因尺寸變大，視覺上和手感上會有變厚實的錯覺。新機的螢幕從前代的 6.2 吋升級到 7 吋 OLED (此處作者口誤，後續提到是 LCD)，並且黑邊似乎沒有變窄，但螢幕顯示區域確實變大了。



Joy-Con 與新功能


作者對 Joy-Con 的拆卸方式特別感興趣。新機的 Joy-Con 透過按壓背後的按鈕即可直接向下抽取，操作起來非常輕鬆。然而，作者對於拆下 Joy-Con 後機身側邊非常突出的金屬接點感到些許擔憂，擔心容易斷裂，建議未來可能需要保護套或考慮再購買一組 Joy-Con。



新機的右側 Joy-Con 底下增加了一個新的 C 按鍵。這個 C 按鍵是任天堂這次非常核心的功能，主要用於 Game Chat，最多支援 12 人線上語音或 4 人螢幕共享。但有趣的是，這項功能只免費開放到明年的三月，之後可能會需要付費，這讓作者覺得有點意外。



MicroSD 卡槽升級為 MicroSD Express 規格，支援的容量更高（最高可達 256GB），但作者提到 256GB 的卡價格高達 400 人民幣，相當昂貴。



遊戲體驗與效能表現


作者首先進入遊戲體驗 HDR 效果，並表示效果很不錯，尤其是綠色光芒的顯示非常亮眼。接著體驗了瑪利歐賽車的世界模式，在掌機模式下畫面流暢，肉眼可見地穩定在 60 幀左右，相比前代畫面清晰許多。



新機還包含了一個名為「說明書」的遊戲，它實際上是一個互動式的教學兼迷你遊戲合集，售價 10 美元。遊戲會引導玩家操作不同按鍵並進行小挑戰，例如尋找手把震動最強烈的部分。作者雖然喜歡這個創意，但認為需要花錢購買「說明書」有些令人意外。



接著作者體驗了輪椅籃球遊戲。這款遊戲的操作方式相當獨特，需要用 Joy-Con 模擬輪椅推動輪子的動作，操作起來非常有體感且不容易，尤其需要精準控制才能投籃命中，操作的擬真度很高。



對於備受關注的電馭叛客 2077 在新機上的表現，作者表示掌機模式下可設定為畫質模式（1080p 30幀）或效能模式（720p 40幀），這個設定略顯幽默。不過作者認為遊戲整體是完全可玩的，特別是 TV 模式下表現不俗，幀率穩定。相較於許多使用 PS4 玩此遊戲的玩家，Switch 2 搭載的 DLSS 技術肯定會讓遊戲體驗好上不少。在掌機模式靜態場景下畫面觀感很好，但在快速移動時 DLSS 的痕跡會比較明顯。近景的人物模型也很精緻，打鬥時幀率也很穩定，展現了第三方遊戲不錯的運行水平。



硬體細節與總結


作者提到 Switch 2 使用的是 NVIDIA 的訂製晶片 T239，效能約等於搭載 DLSS 的 1050ti 等級，浮點運算能力約 1.7 TFLOPS，與 PS4 的 1.8 TFLOPS 相近。在底座模式下，效能可提升至 3.1 TFLOPS。作者開玩笑說這有點像是索尼曾設想的 PS4 等級掌機終於實現了，但疑問任天堂會用這個效能撐多久。儘管第一方遊戲一直很優秀，但第三方遊戲的表現主要取決於硬體性能。



遊戲卡帶最高支援 64GB 容量，這意味著像電馭叛客 2077 這種大型遊戲的本體加 DLC 可以塞進一張卡帶裡，儲存能力相當可觀。



作者也體驗了另一個名為「東吃香蕉」的體感遊戲，玩法類似打地鼠，但需要重擊地面並模仿吃香蕉，地圖是 3D 可旋轉尋找道具，支援場景破壞，運行效果不錯，遊玩時不怎麼掉幀，但過場轉場時會出現卡頓。



最後，作者表示這次對新機進行了詳細的體驗，並邀請觀眾在評論區提出關於這次升級或想了解的問題，他會盡量回答。影片到此結束，期待新機正式到手。



=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1EvMJ9xrYl0

F O L L O W M E

值得閱讀的理由



  • 深入了解被譽為 Switch 2 的新機在效能、螢幕、手感等方面的具體提升與變化。

  • 詳細體驗並分析了新機在遊玩瑪利歐賽車、電馭叛客 2077 等遊戲時的流暢度與畫面表現，並與前代及 PS4 進行對比。

遊戲體驗與效能表現


作者首先進入遊戲體驗 HDR 效果，並表示效果很不錯，尤其是綠色光芒的顯示非常亮眼。接著體驗了瑪利歐賽車的世界模式，在掌機模式下畫面流暢，肉眼可見地穩定在 60 幀左右，相比前代畫面清晰許多。



新機還包含了一個名為「說明書」的遊戲，它實際上是一個互動式的教學兼迷你遊戲合集，售價 10 美元。遊戲會引導玩家操作不同按鍵並進行小挑戰，例如尋找手把震動最強烈的部分。作者雖然喜歡這個創意，但認為需要花錢購買「說明書」有些令人意外。



接著作者體驗了輪椅籃球遊戲。這款遊戲的操作方式相當獨特，需要用 Joy-Con 模擬輪椅推動輪子的動作，操作起來非常有體感且不容易，尤其需要精準控制才能投籃命中，操作的擬真度很高。



對於備受關注的電馭叛客 2077 在新機上的表現，作者表示掌機模式下可設定為畫質模式（1080p 30幀）或效能模式（720p 40幀），這個設定略顯幽默。不過作者認為遊戲整體是完全可玩的，特別是 TV 模式下表現不俗，幀率穩定。相較於許多使用 PS4 玩此遊戲的玩家，Switch 2 搭載的 DLSS 技術肯定會讓遊戲體驗好上不少。在掌機模式靜態場景下畫面觀感很好，但在快速移動時 DLSS 的痕跡會比較明顯。近景的人物模型也很精緻，打鬥時幀率也很穩定，展現了第三方遊戲不錯的運行水平。



硬體細節與總結


作者提到 Switch 2 使用的是 NVIDIA 的訂製晶片 T239，效能約等於搭載 DLSS 的 1050ti 等級，浮點運算能力約 1.7 TFLOPS，與 PS4 的 1.8 TFLOPS 相近。在底座模式下，效能可提升至 3.1 TFLOPS。作者開玩笑說這有點像是索尼曾設想的 PS4 等級掌機終於實現了，但疑問任天堂會用這個效能撐多久。儘管第一方遊戲一直很優秀，但第三方遊戲的表現主要取決於硬體性能。



遊戲卡帶最高支援 64GB 容量，這意味著像電馭叛客 2077 這種大型遊戲的本體加 DLC 可以塞進一張卡帶裡，儲存能力相當可觀。



作者也體驗了另一個名為「東吃香蕉」的體感遊戲，玩法類似打地鼠，但需要重擊地面並模仿吃香蕉，地圖是 3D 可旋轉尋找道具，支援場景破壞，運行效果不錯，遊玩時不怎麼掉幀，但過場轉場時會出現卡頓。



最後，作者表示這次對新機進行了詳細的體驗，並邀請觀眾在評論區提出關於這次升級或想了解的問題，他會盡量回答。影片到此結束，期待新機正式到手。



=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1EvMJ9xrYl0

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

F O L L O W M E

item.title: 索尼 Sony WH-1000XM6 上頭體驗：三年之期已到，這次可以釘幾年？ ｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: 索尼 Sony WH-1000XM6 上頭體驗：三年之期已到，這次可以釘幾年？ ｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解備受期待的 Sony WH-1000XM6 耳機相較前代 XM5 的主要升級。
  • 深入探討新一代耳機在降噪技術與音質調校上的改進細節。
  • 發現 Sony 在使用者體驗優化方面所做的實用更新，例如可折疊設計、充電時使用等。

摘要

影片開頭，作者觀察到近年來耳罩式耳機的創新似乎停滯不前，並以 Apple AirPods Max 為例，認為其多年來僅有顏色和接口的改變。然而，作者表示有一款他期盼已久的耳機，在暌違三年後推出了全新一代，那就是 Sony WH-1000XM6 (XM6)。作者認為，Sony 這次的改進相當值得稱讚，做出了一些非常實用的升級。

首先是外觀與佩戴方面的變化。XM6 的充電盒比 XM5 小巧許多，並且回歸了備受 XM5 用戶期待的可折疊設計。隨著折疊功能的歸來，耳機的旋轉方向也得以調整，現在將耳機掛在脖子上時，終於不會再卡到鎖骨。外觀上，XM6 大致延續了 XM5 的設計風格，頭帶稍寬，前方取消了縫線，更容易辨識左右。雖然外觀差異不大，但佩戴體驗有顯著不同，XM6 的耳罩支撐感更強、壓力更大，這帶來更好的被動降噪效果，但可能對某些頭型的人來說會稍緊。不過，作者在長時間搭機佩戴後，證實其舒適度並無問題。

影片中最令作者驚喜的升級在於降噪性能。在 XM5 已表現出色的基礎上，XM6 的降噪更上一層樓。作者解釋了主動降噪（ANC）的原理，並指出 XM6 除了更緊密的佩戴外，將麥克風數量從上一代的 8 個增加到 **12 個**。然而，光增加麥克風不足以提升降噪，還需要強大的運算能力即時處理。因此，Sony 直接將降噪晶片從 QN1 升級到跳過了 QN2e 的 **QN3**，其運算能力是 QN1 的約 **7 倍**，確保能及時發射反相聲波抵消噪音。

為了驗證 XM6 的降噪效果，作者選擇了一個極端環境進行測試：**直升機**。在飛行中戴上 XM6 後，作者發現其降噪效果「遠超想像」。雖然直升機場景不適用於所有人，但地鐵、鬧區、施工等常見噪音，XM6 都能有效應對。作者還將三款耳機帶到實驗室，使用昂貴的模擬人頭裝置進行了**降噪曲線測試**，證實 XM6 在幾乎所有頻段上的降噪表現都優於 XM5，與作者的實際聽感一致。

在音質方面，XM5 的聲音已經相當不錯，作者認為 XM6 在音質上更多是做出了調音取向的選擇。XM6 的低頻更為飽滿厚重，中頻人聲則清晰不被干擾。音質是主觀感受，但這次 Sony 與多位曾為蕾哈娜、凱莉克萊森、女神卡卡等葛萊美獲獎藝人服務的**母帶工程師**合作，為 XM6 進行了微調。此外，App 中新增了有趣的「**劇院模式**」，本質上是一種空間音訊技術，開啟後能感覺到聲場更寬闊，提供更具臨場感的影院級聽覺體驗。

除了音質與降噪的提升，Sony 還對 XM6 的日常使用者體驗進行了許多優化。例如，EQ 調整從之前的 5 段加 Clear Bass 變為更直觀詳細的 **10 段均衡器**。針對選項過多可能導致選擇困難的問題，新增了「尋找你的均衡器」功能，透過引導式選項幫助用戶找到適合自己的設置。**電源按鈕**採用全新設計，告別了前代難以按對的問題。左側耳機外殼上的**凸點**設計得以保留，方便在黑暗中辨識左右。對於重度使用者而言，一大福音是 XM6 **支援邊充電邊使用**。即使開啟降噪，XM6 的續航仍有約 **30 小時**，足以應付不時之需。

總結來說，XM6 作為 Sony 時隔三年推出的新一代旗艦耳罩式耳機，帶來了更強的降噪和更細節的優化。除了音質和降噪的硬體升級，Sony 在使用者體驗上所做的眾多優化令作者感到驚喜。或許在音質趨於成熟的當下，優化使用體驗也是一大方向。在無線耳罩式耳機領域中，XM6 基本上沒有對手，除非用戶偏好不同的聲音風格。

================================================

Honestly, at this point in 2025,. it's hard for me to imagine. how much more improvement headphones can make,. especially those big over-ear ones. Take Apple, for example. Five years have passed,. and last year's AirPods Max. just gave it a new color scheme. and switched to a USB-C port. What else? Nothing changed. Wow,. so technology's all about changing the shell now, huh? But today. there's a pair of headphones I've been waiting for a long time. After three years, they've finally rolled out a brand-new generation. But is the change worth the three-year wait? This is the all-new Sony WH-1000XM6. I think it's actually pretty commendable. They've made some pretty practical improvements. Let me show you the case for the XM6 this time. It looks. a lot smaller compared to. the XM5's case. And then, on the side, there's this magnetic clasp. You just open it like this,. and there's the folded XM6 inside. Yeah, that's right,. it folds. Any XM5 veteran. knows how valuable this upgrade is, okay? Along with the folding design coming back,. so does the headphone's rotation direction. Now, when you hang the headphones like this,.

they finally won't be clashing with your collarbone anymore. Besides that,. the XM6's appearance. mostly carries on the design style of the XM5. The headband here is a bit wider,. and the stitching line at the front has been removed. You can easily tell which side is the front. There's not much difference in appearance,. but the difference in wearing experience is quite noticeable. Compared to the XM5,. the XM6's ear cushions provide stronger support,. and the headphones exert more pressure. The upside is that they fit more snugly,. offering better passive noise cancellation. But the downside is that. some people with certain head shapes might find them a bit tight. However, a while back, I flew abroad. and wore them almost the entire time,. from leaving my house to arriving at the hotel. I wore them intensively for a good part of the day. And guess what? They functioned perfectly fine; no issues at all. Of course,. the stuff I mentioned earlier were just little perks. The upgrade in the XM6 that surprised me the most. is definitely the noise cancellation. I was already quite satisfied. with the XM5's noise cancellation,. and now it's even better. Those in the know understand that. active noise cancellation in headphones. works by emitting an inverted sound wave.

inside the headphones. to cancel out the external sounds coming in. Sony just went all out with this one. Apart from the tighter fit I mentioned earlier,. for this XM6,. they've increased the number of microphones from eight in the previous generation. to twelve. With more microphones,. they can capture more noise. But here comes another problem. If they capture more noise. but can't process the sound information in a timely manner,. causing delays,. then not only will the noise cancellation not work,. but it might even make the sound noisier. The impact of this could be even greater than you'd imagine. Here's a recording of some noise I found. I'll play it here. to represent the ambient noise we hear. Let me give it a listen. Now, I've duplicated this audio track to the bottom. and inverted its phase. This track here. represents the inverted sound. emitted by our noise-canceling headphones. If we play them together now,. you'll notice that,. there's no sound at all. Now,. let's add a little bit of delay to it. and listen again. If we drag it even more,. to here,.

doesn't it feel like it's better not to turn it on at all? So, having enough microphones alone isn't really enough. The headphones also need to be able to promptly emit. an inverted sound wave. that cancels out the noise. That's why on the XM6,. Sony directly upgraded the noise-canceling chip. from the previous QN1 to the QN3,. skipping over the QN2e used in the LinkBuds S. It might not sound like a big deal,. but the QN3's computing power is about. seven times greater than that of the QN1. To test the noise-canceling performance of these headphones,. I chose an even noisier place. Ta-da! A helicopter pad. We're about to board this helicopter. and see. how well it performs in terms of noise cancellation. Wow, after I put on the XM6 mid-flight, I found that. its noise-canceling effect was way better than I'd imagined. Of course, the noise-canceling scenario in a helicopter. might not resonate with everyone. After all, not many of us are taking helicopters out every day. But subways,. busy streets,. and construction noises. I can't even stand them through a closed window,. let alone having them right in my face. To get a clearer understanding. of just how much the XM6's noise cancellation has improved,. I brought these three headphones to the lab. and tested their noise-canceling curves.

This seemingly ordinary dummy head microphone setup. could almost buy me two SU7 MAX cars. The actual test results did match up with what I heard. The XM6's noise cancellation is an improvement. across almost the entire frequency range compared to the XM5. With such outstanding noise-canceling performance,. the sound quality is bound to be even better. But the XM5's sound was already pretty great,. so I feel like. with the XM6, Sony has made more of a choice. in terms of tuning preference. The low frequencies are fuller. and heavier,. while the mid-frequency vocals are crystal clear. and not overshadowed by other sounds. So, which one do you guys prefer? Sound quality is subjective, after all. However, this time around, Sony even collaborated with. several mastering engineers to fine-tune the sound of the XM6. You might not be familiar with the engineers' names,. but the artists they've worked with. Rihanna. Kelly Clarkson. Lady Gaga. they've basically all got Grammys. This time. There's also this interesting new feature on the app:. Movie mode. The description might sound a bit abstract,. but in reality, it's essentially a form of spatial audio technology. Once you turn it on,. you'll feel like the soundstage is wider,. giving you that authentic.

cinema-like listening experience. Then this time. apart from the improvements in sound quality and noise cancellation,. Sony has also optimized many aspects. of the everyday user experience with the XM6. For instance,. previously, Sony's EQ tuning. had five frequency bands plus a Clear Bass option. But how many of you actually knew what Clear Bass adjusted? You'd slide it around and think,. Oh ~. so this is what makes the bass more immersive. Well, this time with the XM6,. they've ditched Clear Bass. and replaced it with a more intuitive, detailed 10-band EQ. But sometimes, having too many options. can leave you spoiled for choice. That's why I actually prefer using this. "Find Your Equalizer" feature. You tap into it, and there are several different preset options. You just go through them one by one, picking based on your own preferences,. and then you'll get. an EQ setting that suits you best. And. look here. a brand-new power button. With the previous generations,. pressing that button was like trying to plug in a USB; you could never seem to get it right. But now, problem solved, right? You won't get confused anymore. And I don't know if you guys have noticed,. but whether it's the in-ear or over-ear models,.

there's always this little bump on the left side. That way, even in pitch darkness,. you can tell left from right. Putting the headphones on correctly. those little details really get me. Oh, and one more thing! This time. the XM6 even lets you use it while charging. Heavy users, rejoice! With noise cancellation on,. the XM6 still offers around 30 hours of battery life. This is a great lifesaver if you forget to charge it. So, to sum up:. stronger noise cancellation,. more detailed optimizations. This is Sony's new flagship over-ear headphone,. brought back after three years. And apart from the improvements in sound and noise cancellation,. the many optimizations Sony has made. to the user experience have really surprised me. Maybe in this day and age, when sound quality has reached a certain peak,. optimizing the user experience is also a great direction to take. Especially in the realm of truly wireless over-ear headphones,. the XM6 basically has no rivals. unless, of course, you prefer a different sound signature. Ok. So that's all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time. Bye!

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iLI30vSuNWE

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

比起更好的音質和更好的降噪，這次XM6帶給我更大的驚喜，是對體驗的優化。我想，這也許是另一個讓大家選擇索尼的原因。

往期影片：

https://youtu.be/dKfvYWKlYsU

https://youtu.be/XTl2M9g_Olk

F O L L O W M E

Weibo: @大狸子切切里

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/471303350

#數碼 #開箱 #耳機 #索尼

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解備受期待的 Sony WH-1000XM6 耳機相較前代 XM5 的主要升級。
  • 深入探討新一代耳機在降噪技術與音質調校上的改進細節。

在音質方面，XM5 的聲音已經相當不錯，作者認為 XM6 在音質上更多是做出了調音取向的選擇。XM6 的低頻更為飽滿厚重，中頻人聲則清晰不被干擾。音質是主觀感受，但這次 Sony 與多位曾為蕾哈娜、凱莉克萊森、女神卡卡等葛萊美獲獎藝人服務的**母帶工程師**合作，為 XM6 進行了微調。此外，App 中新增了有趣的「**劇院模式**」，本質上是一種空間音訊技術，開啟後能感覺到聲場更寬闊，提供更具臨場感的影院級聽覺體驗。

除了音質與降噪的提升，Sony 還對 XM6 的日常使用者體驗進行了許多優化。例如，EQ 調整從之前的 5 段加 Clear Bass 變為更直觀詳細的 **10 段均衡器**。針對選項過多可能導致選擇困難的問題，新增了「尋找你的均衡器」功能，透過引導式選項幫助用戶找到適合自己的設置。**電源按鈕**採用全新設計，告別了前代難以按對的問題。左側耳機外殼上的**凸點**設計得以保留，方便在黑暗中辨識左右。對於重度使用者而言，一大福音是 XM6 **支援邊充電邊使用**。即使開啟降噪，XM6 的續航仍有約 **30 小時**，足以應付不時之需。

總結來說，XM6 作為 Sony 時隔三年推出的新一代旗艦耳罩式耳機，帶來了更強的降噪和更細節的優化。除了音質和降噪的硬體升級，Sony 在使用者體驗上所做的眾多優化令作者感到驚喜。或許在音質趨於成熟的當下，優化使用體驗也是一大方向。在無線耳罩式耳機領域中，XM6 基本上沒有對手，除非用戶偏好不同的聲音風格。

================================================

Honestly, at this point in 2025,. it's hard for me to imagine. how much more improvement headphones can make,. especially those big over-ear ones. Take Apple, for example. Five years have passed,. and last year's AirPods Max. just gave it a new color scheme. and switched to a USB-C port. What else? Nothing changed. Wow,. so technology's all about changing the shell now, huh? But today. there's a pair of headphones I've been waiting for a long time. After three years, they've finally rolled out a brand-new generation. But is the change worth the three-year wait? This is the all-new Sony WH-1000XM6. I think it's actually pretty commendable. They've made some pretty practical improvements. Let me show you the case for the XM6 this time. It looks. a lot smaller compared to. the XM5's case. And then, on the side, there's this magnetic clasp. You just open it like this,. and there's the folded XM6 inside. Yeah, that's right,. it folds. Any XM5 veteran. knows how valuable this upgrade is, okay? Along with the folding design coming back,. so does the headphone's rotation direction. Now, when you hang the headphones like this,.

they finally won't be clashing with your collarbone anymore. Besides that,. the XM6's appearance. mostly carries on the design style of the XM5. The headband here is a bit wider,. and the stitching line at the front has been removed. You can easily tell which side is the front. There's not much difference in appearance,. but the difference in wearing experience is quite noticeable. Compared to the XM5,. the XM6's ear cushions provide stronger support,. and the headphones exert more pressure. The upside is that they fit more snugly,. offering better passive noise cancellation. But the downside is that. some people with certain head shapes might find them a bit tight. However, a while back, I flew abroad. and wore them almost the entire time,. from leaving my house to arriving at the hotel. I wore them intensively for a good part of the day. And guess what? They functioned perfectly fine; no issues at all. Of course,. the stuff I mentioned earlier were just little perks. The upgrade in the XM6 that surprised me the most. is definitely the noise cancellation. I was already quite satisfied. with the XM5's noise cancellation,. and now it's even better. Those in the know understand that. active noise cancellation in headphones. works by emitting an inverted sound wave.

inside the headphones. to cancel out the external sounds coming in. Sony just went all out with this one. Apart from the tighter fit I mentioned earlier,. for this XM6,. they've increased the number of microphones from eight in the previous generation. to twelve. With more microphones,. they can capture more noise. But here comes another problem. If they capture more noise. but can't process the sound information in a timely manner,. causing delays,. then not only will the noise cancellation not work,. but it might even make the sound noisier. The impact of this could be even greater than you'd imagine. Here's a recording of some noise I found. I'll play it here. to represent the ambient noise we hear. Let me give it a listen. Now, I've duplicated this audio track to the bottom. and inverted its phase. This track here. represents the inverted sound. emitted by our noise-canceling headphones. If we play them together now,. you'll notice that,. there's no sound at all. Now,. let's add a little bit of delay to it. and listen again. If we drag it even more,. to here,.

doesn't it feel like it's better not to turn it on at all? So, having enough microphones alone isn't really enough. The headphones also need to be able to promptly emit. an inverted sound wave. that cancels out the noise. That's why on the XM6,. Sony directly upgraded the noise-canceling chip. from the previous QN1 to the QN3,. skipping over the QN2e used in the LinkBuds S. It might not sound like a big deal,. but the QN3's computing power is about. seven times greater than that of the QN1. To test the noise-canceling performance of these headphones,. I chose an even noisier place. Ta-da! A helicopter pad. We're about to board this helicopter. and see. how well it performs in terms of noise cancellation. Wow, after I put on the XM6 mid-flight, I found that. its noise-canceling effect was way better than I'd imagined. Of course, the noise-canceling scenario in a helicopter. might not resonate with everyone. After all, not many of us are taking helicopters out every day. But subways,. busy streets,. and construction noises. I can't even stand them through a closed window,. let alone having them right in my face. To get a clearer understanding. of just how much the XM6's noise cancellation has improved,. I brought these three headphones to the lab. and tested their noise-canceling curves.

This seemingly ordinary dummy head microphone setup. could almost buy me two SU7 MAX cars. The actual test results did match up with what I heard. The XM6's noise cancellation is an improvement. across almost the entire frequency range compared to the XM5. With such outstanding noise-canceling performance,. the sound quality is bound to be even better. But the XM5's sound was already pretty great,. so I feel like. with the XM6, Sony has made more of a choice. in terms of tuning preference. The low frequencies are fuller. and heavier,. while the mid-frequency vocals are crystal clear. and not overshadowed by other sounds. So, which one do you guys prefer? Sound quality is subjective, after all. However, this time around, Sony even collaborated with. several mastering engineers to fine-tune the sound of the XM6. You might not be familiar with the engineers' names,. but the artists they've worked with. Rihanna. Kelly Clarkson. Lady Gaga. they've basically all got Grammys. This time. There's also this interesting new feature on the app:. Movie mode. The description might sound a bit abstract,. but in reality, it's essentially a form of spatial audio technology. Once you turn it on,. you'll feel like the soundstage is wider,. giving you that authentic.

cinema-like listening experience. Then this time. apart from the improvements in sound quality and noise cancellation,. Sony has also optimized many aspects. of the everyday user experience with the XM6. For instance,. previously, Sony's EQ tuning. had five frequency bands plus a Clear Bass option. But how many of you actually knew what Clear Bass adjusted? You'd slide it around and think,. Oh ~. so this is what makes the bass more immersive. Well, this time with the XM6,. they've ditched Clear Bass. and replaced it with a more intuitive, detailed 10-band EQ. But sometimes, having too many options. can leave you spoiled for choice. That's why I actually prefer using this. "Find Your Equalizer" feature. You tap into it, and there are several different preset options. You just go through them one by one, picking based on your own preferences,. and then you'll get. an EQ setting that suits you best. And. look here. a brand-new power button. With the previous generations,. pressing that button was like trying to plug in a USB; you could never seem to get it right. But now, problem solved, right? You won't get confused anymore. And I don't know if you guys have noticed,. but whether it's the in-ear or over-ear models,.

there's always this little bump on the left side. That way, even in pitch darkness,. you can tell left from right. Putting the headphones on correctly. those little details really get me. Oh, and one more thing! This time. the XM6 even lets you use it while charging. Heavy users, rejoice! With noise cancellation on,. the XM6 still offers around 30 hours of battery life. This is a great lifesaver if you forget to charge it. So, to sum up:. stronger noise cancellation,. more detailed optimizations. This is Sony's new flagship over-ear headphone,. brought back after three years. And apart from the improvements in sound and noise cancellation,. the many optimizations Sony has made. to the user experience have really surprised me. Maybe in this day and age, when sound quality has reached a certain peak,. optimizing the user experience is also a great direction to take. Especially in the realm of truly wireless over-ear headphones,. the XM6 basically has no rivals. unless, of course, you prefer a different sound signature. Ok. So that's all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time. Bye!

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iLI30vSuNWE

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

比起更好的音質和更好的降噪，這次XM6帶給我更大的驚喜，是對體驗的優化。我想，這也許是另一個讓大家選擇索尼的原因。

https://youtu.be/XTl2M9g_Olk

#數碼 #開箱 #耳機 #索尼
item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解備受期待的 Sony WH-1000XM6 耳機相較前代 XM5 的主要升級。
  • 深入探討新一代耳機在降噪技術與音質調校上的改進細節。
  • 發現 Sony 在使用者體驗優化方面所做的實用更新，例如可折疊設計、充電時使用等。

摘要

影片開頭，作者觀察到近年來耳罩式耳機的創新似乎停滯不前，並以 Apple AirPods Max 為例，認為其多年來僅有顏色和接口的改變。然而，作者表示有一款他期盼已久的耳機，在暌違三年後推出了全新一代，那就是 Sony WH-1000XM6 (XM6)。作者認為，Sony 這次的改進相當值得稱讚，做出了一些非常實用的升級。

首先是外觀與佩戴方面的變化。XM6 的充電盒比 XM5 小巧許多，並且回歸了備受 XM5 用戶期待的可折疊設計。隨著折疊功能的歸來，耳機的旋轉方向也得以調整，現在將耳機掛在脖子上時，終於不會再卡到鎖骨。外觀上，XM6 大致延續了 XM5 的設計風格，頭帶稍寬，前方取消了縫線，更容易辨識左右。雖然外觀差異不大，但佩戴體驗有顯著不同，XM6 的耳罩支撐感更強、壓力更大，這帶來更好的被動降噪效果，但可能對某些頭型的人來說會稍緊。不過，作者在長時間搭機佩戴後，證實其舒適度並無問題。

影片中最令作者驚喜的升級在於降噪性能。在 XM5 已表現出色的基礎上，XM6 的降噪更上一層樓。作者解釋了主動降噪（ANC）的原理，並指出 XM6 除了更緊密的佩戴外，將麥克風數量從上一代的 8 個增加到 **12 個**。然而，光增加麥克風不足以提升降噪，還需要強大的運算能力即時處理。因此，Sony 直接將降噪晶片從 QN1 升級到跳過了 QN2e 的 **QN3**，其運算能力是 QN1 的約 **7 倍**，確保能及時發射反相聲波抵消噪音。

為了驗證 XM6 的降噪效果，作者選擇了一個極端環境進行測試：**直升機**。在飛行中戴上 XM6 後，作者發現其降噪效果「遠超想像」。雖然直升機場景不適用於所有人，但地鐵、鬧區、施工等常見噪音，XM6 都能有效應對。作者還將三款耳機帶到實驗室，使用昂貴的模擬人頭裝置進行了**降噪曲線測試**，證實 XM6 在幾乎所有頻段上的降噪表現都優於 XM5，與作者的實際聽感一致。

在音質方面，XM5 的聲音已經相當不錯，作者認為 XM6 在音質上更多是做出了調音取向的選擇。XM6 的低頻更為飽滿厚重，中頻人聲則清晰不被干擾。音質是主觀感受，但這次 Sony 與多位曾為蕾哈娜、凱莉克萊森、女神卡卡等葛萊美獲獎藝人服務的**母帶工程師**合作，為 XM6 進行了微調。此外，App 中新增了有趣的「**劇院模式**」，本質上是一種空間音訊技術，開啟後能感覺到聲場更寬闊，提供更具臨場感的影院級聽覺體驗。

除了音質與降噪的提升，Sony 還對 XM6 的日常使用者體驗進行了許多優化。例如，EQ 調整從之前的 5 段加 Clear Bass 變為更直觀詳細的 **10 段均衡器**。針對選項過多可能導致選擇困難的問題，新增了「尋找你的均衡器」功能，透過引導式選項幫助用戶找到適合自己的設置。**電源按鈕**採用全新設計，告別了前代難以按對的問題。左側耳機外殼上的**凸點**設計得以保留，方便在黑暗中辨識左右。對於重度使用者而言，一大福音是 XM6 **支援邊充電邊使用**。即使開啟降噪，XM6 的續航仍有約 **30 小時**，足以應付不時之需。

總結來說，XM6 作為 Sony 時隔三年推出的新一代旗艦耳罩式耳機，帶來了更強的降噪和更細節的優化。除了音質和降噪的硬體升級，Sony 在使用者體驗上所做的眾多優化令作者感到驚喜。或許在音質趨於成熟的當下，優化使用體驗也是一大方向。在無線耳罩式耳機領域中，XM6 基本上沒有對手，除非用戶偏好不同的聲音風格。

================================================

Five years have passed,. and last year's AirPods Max. just gave it a new color scheme. and switched to a USB-C port. What else? Nothing changed. Wow,. so technology's all about changing the shell now, huh? But today. there's a pair of headphones I've been waiting for a long time. After three years, they've finally rolled out a brand-new generation. But is the change worth the three-year wait? This is the all-new Sony WH-1000XM6. I think it's actually pretty commendable. They've made some pretty practical improvements. Let me show you the case for the XM6 this time. It looks. a lot smaller compared to. the XM5's case. And then, on the side, there's this magnetic clasp. You just open it like this,. and there's the folded XM6 inside. Yeah, that's right,. it folds. Any XM5 veteran. knows how valuable this upgrade is, okay? Along with the folding design coming back,. so does the headphone's rotation direction. Now, when you hang the headphones like this,.

they finally won't be clashing with your collarbone anymore. Besides that,. the XM6's appearance. mostly carries on the design style of the XM5. The headband here is a bit wider,. and the stitching line at the front has been removed. You can easily tell which side is the front. There's not much difference in appearance,. but the difference in wearing experience is quite noticeable. Compared to the XM5,. the XM6's ear cushions provide stronger support,. and the headphones exert more pressure. The upside is that they fit more snugly,. offering better passive noise cancellation. But the downside is that. some people with certain head shapes might find them a bit tight. However, a while back, I flew abroad. and wore them almost the entire time,. from leaving my house to arriving at the hotel. I wore them intensively for a good part of the day. And guess what? They functioned perfectly fine; no issues at all. Of course,. the stuff I mentioned earlier were just little perks. The upgrade in the XM6 that surprised me the most. is definitely the noise cancellation. I was already quite satisfied. with the XM5's noise cancellation,. and now it's even better. Those in the know understand that. active noise cancellation in headphones. works by emitting an inverted sound wave.

inside the headphones. to cancel out the external sounds coming in. Sony just went all out with this one. Apart from the tighter fit I mentioned earlier,. for this XM6,. they've increased the number of microphones from eight in the previous generation. to twelve. With more microphones,. they can capture more noise. But here comes another problem. If they capture more noise. but can't process the sound information in a timely manner,. causing delays,. then not only will the noise cancellation not work,. but it might even make the sound noisier. The impact of this could be even greater than you'd imagine. Here's a recording of some noise I found. I'll play it here. to represent the ambient noise we hear. Let me give it a listen. Now, I've duplicated this audio track to the bottom. and inverted its phase. This track here. represents the inverted sound. emitted by our noise-canceling headphones. If we play them together now,. you'll notice that,. there's no sound at all. Now,. let's add a little bit of delay to it. and listen again. If we drag it even more,. to here,.

doesn't it feel like it's better not to turn it on at all? So, having enough microphones alone isn't really enough. The headphones also need to be able to promptly emit. an inverted sound wave. that cancels out the noise. That's why on the XM6,. Sony directly upgraded the noise-canceling chip. from the previous QN1 to the QN3,. skipping over the QN2e used in the LinkBuds S. It might not sound like a big deal,. but the QN3's computing power is about. seven times greater than that of the QN1. To test the noise-canceling performance of these headphones,. I chose an even noisier place. Ta-da! A helicopter pad. We're about to board this helicopter. and see. how well it performs in terms of noise cancellation. Wow, after I put on the XM6 mid-flight, I found that. its noise-canceling effect was way better than I'd imagined. Of course, the noise-canceling scenario in a helicopter. might not resonate with everyone. After all, not many of us are taking helicopters out every day. But subways,. busy streets,. and construction noises. I can't even stand them through a closed window,. let alone having them right in my face. To get a clearer understanding. of just how much the XM6's noise cancellation has improved,. I brought these three headphones to the lab. and tested their noise-canceling curves.

This seemingly ordinary dummy head microphone setup. could almost buy me two SU7 MAX cars. The actual test results did match up with what I heard. The XM6's noise cancellation is an improvement. across almost the entire frequency range compared to the XM5. With such outstanding noise-canceling performance,. the sound quality is bound to be even better. But the XM5's sound was already pretty great,. so I feel like. with the XM6, Sony has made more of a choice. in terms of tuning preference. The low frequencies are fuller. and heavier,. while the mid-frequency vocals are crystal clear. and not overshadowed by other sounds. So, which one do you guys prefer? Sound quality is subjective, after all. However, this time around, Sony even collaborated with. several mastering engineers to fine-tune the sound of the XM6. You might not be familiar with the engineers' names,. but the artists they've worked with. Rihanna. Kelly Clarkson. Lady Gaga. they've basically all got Grammys. This time. There's also this interesting new feature on the app:. Movie mode. The description might sound a bit abstract,. but in reality, it's essentially a form of spatial audio technology. Once you turn it on,. you'll feel like the soundstage is wider,. giving you that authentic.

cinema-like listening experience. Then this time. apart from the improvements in sound quality and noise cancellation,. Sony has also optimized many aspects. of the everyday user experience with the XM6. For instance,. previously, Sony's EQ tuning. had five frequency bands plus a Clear Bass option. Well, this time with the XM6,. they've ditched Clear Bass. and replaced it with a more intuitive, detailed 10-band EQ. But sometimes, having too many options. can leave you spoiled for choice. That's why I actually prefer using this. "Find Your Equalizer" feature. You tap into it, and there are several different preset options. You just go through them one by one, picking based on your own preferences,. and then you'll get. an EQ setting that suits you best. And. look here. a brand-new power button. With the previous generations,. pressing that button was like trying to plug in a USB; you could never seem to get it right. But now, problem solved, right? You won't get confused anymore. And I don't know if you guys have noticed,. but whether it's the in-ear or over-ear models,.

there's always this little bump on the left side. That way, even in pitch darkness,. you can tell left from right. Putting the headphones on correctly. those little details really get me. Oh, and one more thing! This time. the XM6 even lets you use it while charging. Heavy users, rejoice! With noise cancellation on,. the XM6 still offers around 30 hours of battery life. This is a great lifesaver if you forget to charge it. So, to sum up:. stronger noise cancellation,. more detailed optimizations. This is Sony's new flagship over-ear headphone,. brought back after three years. And apart from the improvements in sound and noise cancellation,. the many optimizations Sony has made. to the user experience have really surprised me. Maybe in this day and age, when sound quality has reached a certain peak,. optimizing the user experience is also a great direction to take. Especially in the realm of truly wireless over-ear headphones,. the XM6 basically has no rivals. unless, of course, you prefer a different sound signature. Ok. So that's all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. I'm Cherry. See you next time. Bye!
